---
title: "Rebuilding after the Shatter"
author: "Gloria Aiyebogun"
date: "2026-04-01"
---

*This book is dedicated to every woman who has ever felt broken by love — and to the warrior within her who refused to stay down.*

To the woman who loved deeply, got hurt, and still chose to heal — this is for you.

You are not alone. Your pain is valid. Your healing is possible.

And the shattering? It was never the end of your story.

It was the beginning.
